name: Bircher Muesli
recipeIngredient: 1 medium-coarse chopped apple (red or golden delicious)
1 non-fat fruit yogurt (non-fat milk or soy-milk can be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Adjust liquid amount to achieve desired thickness and let sit for a few minutes.
3. Chop additional fresh fruits according to preference (e.g., strawberries, peaches, blueberries, nectarines, mango, plums, prunes, pears, pitted cherries).
4. Mix in the chopped fruits and serve.
